introSection: Tiki-Waka is a steel Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Walibi Belgium in Wavre, Walloon Brabant, Wallonia, Belgium.

sections.title: Location
sections.content: This roller coaster is located on the former site of Coccinelle, which was relocated to the former site of the ferris wheel.

fullText:
Tiki-Waka is a steel Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Walibi Belgium in Wavre, Walloon Brabant, Wallonia, Belgium.





Blue track and sand supports.

This roller coaster is located on the former site of Coccinelle, which was relocated to the former site of the ferris wheel.
